name: pii-scrubber
description: Scans input text for PII patterns (emails, phone numbers, SSNs, credit card numbers, IP addresses) and replaces matches with configurable redaction tokens. Pure computation with no network access -- safe for sensitive data processing.

PATTERNS_TO_REDACT.description: Comma-separated list of PII pattern names to scan for. Available patterns: email, phone, ssn, credit_card, ip_address. Use 'all' to enable every built-in pattern.

REPLACEMENT_TOKEN.description: String to replace detected PII with. Use type-specific tokens by setting to 'typed', which produces [REDACTED_EMAIL], [REDACTED_PHONE], etc.

INPUT_FIELD.description: When set, only scrub this specific field from the input JSON object. When not set, scrubs all string values recursively.

PRESERVE_FORMAT.description: When true, preserves partial format hints (e.g. '***-**-1234' for SSN, '****-****-****-5678' for credit cards). When false, replaces entirely with the replacement token.

output_shape.scrubbed: The input text/object with PII replaced by redaction tokens
output_shape.detections: Array of {pattern, count} objects summarizing what was found
output_shape.total_redactions: Total number of PII instances redacted
output_shape.patterns_checked: Array of pattern names that were scanned

setup_instructions.title: Install as a minimal-node module
setup_instructions.detail: install_module_from_catalog {name: 'pii-scrubber'}. No secrets or network access required -- this module runs as pure computation in the minimal-node sandbox.

setup_instructions.title: Choose patterns to redact
setup_instructions.detail: Set PATTERNS_TO_REDACT to a comma-separated list of pattern names: email, phone, ssn, credit_card, ip_address, or 'all'. Defaults to all five patterns.

setup_instructions.title: Configure redaction style
setup_instructions.detail: Set REPLACEMENT_TOKEN to '[REDACTED]' for uniform redaction, or 'typed' for pattern-specific tokens like [REDACTED_EMAIL]. Enable PRESERVE_FORMAT to keep partial format hints for downstream validation.

setup_instructions.title: Wire into your workflow
setup_instructions.detail: Place this node before any node that sends data externally (LLM calls, webhooks, logging). Input can be a JSON object (all string values are scrubbed recursively) or a plain string. Output preserves the input structure with PII replaced.
